Through the listed application, the applicant / surety Wazir Ali sorr,:;f Saindad Brohi seeks return of surety furnished by him on behalf of applicants / accused Hazar Khan and Abid. Learned counsel for the applicant / surety contends that applicants / accused were granted protective bail for five days by this Court in the instar,i matter vide order dated 09.08.2021 subject to furnishing solvent surety lrr thL) sum of Rs.25,000/- (Twenty five thousand) each and PR bond in the like amourit to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court. As such, appllcant / surety by depositing original Defence Savings Certificate amounting to Rs.50,000r. stood suretv for the applicants / accused. Learned counsel also contends that the applicants / accused surrendere, l before trial Court and got interim pre-arrest bail vide order dated 10.08.2t)21 Certified true copy of the order is annexed with the application. He, therefore, states that since surety is no more required, applic:rrrt surety has moved this application for its return Mr. Sundar Khan Chachar, Advocate for applicant i surety. I Ij Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, learned Additional Prosecutor General, presr-'nt r- Court in some other matters, waives notice and records his no objection fr:, tt',' grant of this application.

I Ij Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, learned Additional Prosecutor General, presr-'nt r- Court in some other matters, waives notice and records his no objection fr:, tt',' grant of this application.
